```{r}
# =========================================================
# edgeR DEG → GSEA runner (3 comparisons) 
# =========================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(enrichplot)
  library(AnnotationDbi)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(ReactomePA)
  library(DOSE)
  library(msigdbr)
})

set.seed(1234)

run_date  <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y_%m_%d")
run_label <- paste0(run_date, "_GSEA_edgeR_3comparisons_signedlogP")

out_dir <- file.path("bulkRNAseq", run_label)
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

deg_files <- list(
  DRAXIN_vs_ctrl    = "bulkRNAseq/analysis_experiement_library_prepmodeled_2026_02_26/edgeR_expBlocked_DRAXIN_vs_ctrl_ALL.csv",
  diluted_vs_ctrl   = "bulkRNAseq/analysis_experiement_library_prepmodeled_2026_02_26/edgeR_expBlocked_diluted_vs_ctrl_ALL.csv",
  DRAXIN_vs_diluted = "bulkRNAseq/analysis_experiement_library_prepmodeled_2026_02_26/edgeR_expBlocked_DRAXIN_vs_diluted_ALL.csv"
)

# (optional) quick upfront check + message
missing_files <- names(deg_files)[!file.exists(unlist(deg_files))]
if (length(missing_files) > 0) {
  warning("Some DEG files are missing:\n",
          paste0(" - ", missing_files, ": ", unlist(deg_files)[missing_files], collapse = "\n"))
}
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# helpers
# -----------------------------
guess_col <- function(df, candidates, what) {
  hit <- candidates[candidates %in% colnames(df)][1]
  if (is.na(hit)) stop("Could not find ", what, " column. Tried: ", paste(candidates, collapse = ", "))
  hit
}

safe_write_csv <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tryCatch(readr::write_csv(x, path), error = function(e) message("WARN: write_csv failed: ", path, " | ", e$message))
  invisible(TRUE)
}

safe_save_rds <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tryCatch(saveRDS(x, path), error = function(e) message("WARN: saveRDS failed: ", path, " | ", e$message))
  invisible(TRUE)
}

safe_ggsave <- function(path, plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tryCatch(ggplot2::ggsave(path, plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi),
           error = function(e) message("WARN: ggsave failed: ", path, " | ", e$message))
  invisible(TRUE)
}

```

```{r}

# -----------------------------
# mapping + ranks
# -----------------------------
strip_ensg_version <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- sub("^gene:", "", x)
  x <- sub("\\|.*$", "", x)
  sub("\\.\\d+$", "", x)
}

map_ensg_to_entrez <- function(ensg_ids, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) {
  ensg_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(strip_ensg_version(ensg_ids)))
  if (length(ensg_ids) == 0) return(tibble::tibble(ENSEMBL=character(), ENTREZID=character()))

  m2 <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    OrgDb, keys = ensg_ids, keytype = "ENSEMBL", columns = c("ENTREZID")
  ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble() |>
    dplyr::transmute(ENSEMBL = .data$ENSEMBL, ENTREZID = as.character(.data$ENTREZID)) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$ENTREZID)) |>
    dplyr::distinct(.data$ENSEMBL, .keep_all = TRUE)

  m2
}

make_ranks_entrez_signedlogp <- function(df, label, out_dir_local = NULL, use_fdr = FALSE, p_floor = 1e-300) {

  gene_col <- guess_col(df, c("ENSEMBL","x","X","...1","gene","Gene","ENSG","gene_id","Geneid","id"), "ENSG/ENSEMBL")
  lfc_col  <- guess_col(df, c("logFC","log2FoldChange","log2FC"), "logFC")
  p_col    <- if (use_fdr) {
    guess_col(df, c("FDR","padj","adj.P.Val","qvalue"), "FDR/adj p")
  } else {
    guess_col(df, c("PValue","P.Value","pvalue","p_value","p","P"), "PValue")
  }

  df2 <- df |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      ENSEMBL = strip_ensg_version(.data[[gene_col]]),
      logFC   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[lfc_col]])),
      p       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[p_col]]))
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$ENSEMBL), !is.na(.data$logFC), !is.na(.data$p)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(p = pmax(.data$p, p_floor)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$ENSEMBL) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(order_by = .data$p, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(score = sign(.data$logFC) * -log10(.data$p))

  map <- map_ensg_to_entrez(df2$ENSEMBL)

  msg <- sprintf("[%s] ENSEMBL rows=%d | mapped=%d | map_rate=%.1f%%",
                 label, nrow(df2), nrow(map), 100 * (nrow(map)/max(1,nrow(df2))))
  message(msg)

  if (!is.null(out_dir_local)) {
    tryCatch(readr::write_lines(msg, file.path(out_dir_local, "MAPPING_RATE.txt")),
             error = function(e) message("WARN: write_lines failed: ", e$message))
    safe_write_csv(map, file.path(out_dir_local, "ENSEMBL_to_ENTREZ_mapping.csv"))
  }

  ranks <- df2$score[match(map$ENSEMBL, df2$ENSEMBL)]
  names(ranks) <- as.character(map$ENTREZID)

  # ✅ cleanup belongs HERE (after ranks exists)
  ranks <- ranks[!is.na(ranks) & !is.na(names(ranks))]
  ranks <- ranks[is.finite(ranks)]
  names(ranks) <- as.character(names(ranks))
  ranks <- ranks[!duplicated(names(ranks))]

  sort(ranks, decreasing = TRUE)
}

```

```{r}

# -----------------------------
# run_and_save_gsea (small fix: only save RDS if non-NULL)
# -----------------------------
run_and_save_gsea <- function(fun, prefix, out_dir_local,
                              showCategory = 30, make_plot = TRUE, readable = TRUE, ...) {
  dir.create(out_dir_local, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  status <- tibble::tibble(prefix=prefix, ok=FALSE, n_terms=NA_integer_, error=NA_character_)

  res <- tryCatch(
    suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(fun(...))),
    error = function(e) { status$error <<- e$message; NULL }
  )

  if (is.null(res)) return(list(res=NULL, status=status))

  safe_save_rds(res, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, ".rds")))

  res_tbl <- tryCatch(tibble::as_tibble(res@result), error=function(e) tibble::tibble())
  status$ok <- TRUE
  status$n_terms <- nrow(res_tbl)
  safe_write_csv(res_tbl, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, ".csv")))

  if (isTRUE(readable) && inherits(res, "gseaResult")) {
    res_readable <- tryCatch(clusterProfiler::setReadable(res, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID"),
                             error=function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(res_readable)) safe_save_rds(res_readable, file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "__readable.rds")))
  }

  if (isTRUE(make_plot) && inherits(res, "gseaResult") && nrow(res_tbl) > 0) {
    p <- tryCatch(
      enrichplot::dotplot(res, showCategory = min(showCategory, nrow(res_tbl)), split = ".sign") +
        ggplot2::facet_grid(. ~ .sign) + ggplot2::ggtitle(prefix),
      error=function(e) NULL
    )
    if (!is.null(p)) {
      safe_ggsave(file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.png")), p)
      safe_ggsave(file.path(out_dir_local, paste0(prefix, "_dotplot.pdf")), p)
    }
  }

  list(res=res, status=status)
}

```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# MSigDB TERM2GENE builder (version-proof)
# -----------------------------
msig_term2gene <- function(collection, subcollection = NULL,
                           species = "Homo sapiens") {

  m0 <- msigdbr::msigdbr(
    species = species,
    collection = collection,
    subcollection = subcollection
  )

  # msigdbr column name differs by version
  entrez_col <- dplyr::case_when(
    "entrez_gene" %in% names(m0) ~ "entrez_gene",
    "ncbi_gene"  %in% names(m0) ~ "ncbi_gene",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  if (is.na(entrez_col)) {
    stop("msigdbr output has no recognized Entrez column. Columns are:\n",
         paste(names(m0), collapse = ", "))
  }

  m0 |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      term = .data$gs_name,
      gene = as.character(.data[[entrez_col]])
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$gene), .data$gene != "") |>
    dplyr::distinct()
}
```

```{r}

# -----------------------------
# GSEA suite (writes into subfolders under out_comp)
# -----------------------------
gsea_params <- list(
  nPermSimple   = 10000,
  minGSSize     = 10,
  maxGSSize     = 800,
  pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  verbose       = TRUE,
  eps           = 1e-10,
  by            = "fgsea"
)

run_suite_for <- function(ranks, analysis_label, out_dir_local) {
  set.seed(1234)  # ensures RNG exists in every run
  pref <- function(x) paste0(run_label, "__", analysis_label, "__", x)
  all_status <- list()

  # GO
  for (ont in c("CC","BP","MF")) {
    x <- run_and_save_gsea(
      fun = clusterProfiler::gseGO,
      prefix = pref(paste0("gseGO_", ont)),
      out_dir_local = file.path(out_dir_local, "GO"),
      showCategory = 30,
      geneList = ranks,
      ont = ont, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID",
      nPermSimple=gsea_params$nPermSimple, minGSSize=gsea_params$minGSSize, maxGSSize=gsea_params$maxGSSize,
      pvalueCutoff=gsea_params$pvalueCutoff, pAdjustMethod=gsea_params$pAdjustMethod,
      verbose=gsea_params$verbose, eps=gsea_params$eps, by=gsea_params$by,
      readable=TRUE
    )
    all_status[[length(all_status)+1]] <- x$status
  }

  # Reactome
  all_status[[length(all_status)+1]] <- run_and_save_gsea(
    fun = ReactomePA::gsePathway,
    prefix = pref("gseReactome"),
    out_dir_local = file.path(out_dir_local, "Reactome"),
    showCategory = 30,
    geneList = ranks,
    organism="human",
    nPermSimple=gsea_params$nPermSimple, minGSSize=gsea_params$minGSSize, maxGSSize=gsea_params$maxGSSize,
    pvalueCutoff=gsea_params$pvalueCutoff, pAdjustMethod=gsea_params$pAdjustMethod,
    verbose=gsea_params$verbose, eps=gsea_params$eps, by=gsea_params$by,
    readable=TRUE
  )$status

  # DO
  all_status[[length(all_status)+1]] <- run_and_save_gsea(
    fun = DOSE::gseDO,
    prefix = pref("gseDO"),
    out_dir_local = file.path(out_dir_local, "DO"),
    showCategory = 30,
    geneList = ranks,
    organism="hsa",
    nPermSimple=gsea_params$nPermSimple, minGSSize=gsea_params$minGSSize, maxGSSize=gsea_params$maxGSSize,
    pvalueCutoff=gsea_params$pvalueCutoff, pAdjustMethod=gsea_params$pAdjustMethod,
    verbose=gsea_params$verbose, eps=gsea_params$eps, by=gsea_params$by,
    readable=TRUE
  )$status

  # KEGG (optional; may fail quietly)
  all_status[[length(all_status)+1]] <- run_and_save_gsea(
    fun = clusterProfiler::gseKEGG,
    prefix = pref("gseKEGG"),
    out_dir_local = file.path(out_dir_local, "KEGG"),
    showCategory = 20,
    geneList = ranks,
    organism="hsa",
    nPermSimple=gsea_params$nPermSimple, minGSSize=gsea_params$minGSSize, maxGSSize=gsea_params$maxGSSize,
    pvalueCutoff=gsea_params$pvalueCutoff, pAdjustMethod=gsea_params$pAdjustMethod,
    verbose=gsea_params$verbose, eps=gsea_params$eps, by=gsea_params$by,
    readable=TRUE
  )$status

  # MSigDB Hallmark only (fast + useful)
 m <- msig_term2gene(collection = "H")

  all_status[[length(all_status)+1]] <- run_and_save_gsea(
    fun = clusterProfiler::GSEA,
    prefix = pref("msig_H"),
    out_dir_local = file.path(out_dir_local, "MSigDB"),
    showCategory = 20,
    geneList = ranks,
    TERM2GENE = m,
    nPermSimple=gsea_params$nPermSimple, minGSSize=gsea_params$minGSSize, maxGSSize=gsea_params$maxGSSize,
    pvalueCutoff=gsea_params$pvalueCutoff, pAdjustMethod=gsea_params$pAdjustMethod,
    eps=gsea_params$eps, by=gsea_params$by,
    verbose=FALSE,
    readable=TRUE
  )$status

  status_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_status)
  safe_write_csv(status_df, file.path(out_dir_local, "STATUS.csv"))
  status_df
}

```

```{r}
all_status <- list()

for (nm in names(deg_files)) {
  message("=== Processing: ", nm, " ===")

  # ✅ file check must be inside loop
  if (!file.exists(deg_files[[nm]])) {
    warning("Missing DEG file for ", nm, ": ", deg_files[[nm]])
    next
  }

  out_comp <- file.path(out_dir, nm)
  dir.create(out_comp, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  deg_df <- readr::read_csv(deg_files[[nm]], show_col_types = FALSE)

  # standardize ENSG column
  if ("x" %in% names(deg_df) && !"ENSEMBL" %in% names(deg_df)) deg_df <- dplyr::rename(deg_df, ENSEMBL = x)
  if ("...1" %in% names(deg_df) && !"ENSEMBL" %in% names(deg_df)) deg_df <- dplyr::rename(deg_df, ENSEMBL = ...1)

  ranks_ent <- make_ranks_entrez_signedlogp(deg_df, nm, out_dir_local = out_comp, use_fdr = FALSE)

  if (length(ranks_ent) < 50) {
    warning("Too few ranked genes after mapping for ", nm, " (n=", length(ranks_ent),
            "). Skipping GSEA. Check mapping file in: ", out_comp)
    next
  }

  safe_save_rds(ranks_ent, file.path(out_comp, "ranks_ENTREZ.rds"))
  safe_write_csv(tibble::tibble(ENTREZID = names(ranks_ent), rank = unname(ranks_ent)),
                 file.path(out_comp, "ranks_ENTREZ.csv"))

  st <- run_suite_for(ranks_ent, analysis_label = nm, out_dir_local = out_comp)
  all_status[[nm]] <- st

  # ✅ ensures per-comparison status exists even if something weird happens later
  safe_write_csv(st, file.path(out_comp, "STATUS.csv"))
}

status_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_status, .id = "comparison")
safe_write_csv(status_all, file.path(out_dir, "STATUS_ALL.csv"))

message("Done. Outputs written to: ", out_dir)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# EXTRA PASS: MSigDB-only GSEA for ALL collections/subcollections
# Uses saved ranks_ENTREZ.rds from previous run
# =========================================================

# ---- helpers (safe) ----
msig_collections <- function() c("H","C1","C2","C3","C4","C5","C6","C7","C8")

msig_subcollections <- function(collection) {
  if (collection == "C2") return(c("CGP","CP"))
  if (collection == "C5") return(c("BP","CC","MF"))
  return(NULL)
}

safe_msig_term2gene <- function(collection, subcollection = NULL, species = "Homo sapiens") {
  tryCatch(
    msig_term2gene(collection = collection, subcollection = subcollection, species = species),
    error = function(e) {
      message("WARN: msig_term2gene failed for ", collection,
              if (!is.null(subcollection)) paste0(":", subcollection) else "",
              " | ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )
}

# ---- run msigdb for one comparison (writes into MSigDB_ALL/) ----
run_msigdb_only_for <- function(ranks, analysis_label, out_comp,
                                nPermSimple = gsea_params$nPermSimple,
                                minGSSize = gsea_params$minGSSize,
                                maxGSSize = gsea_params$maxGSSize,
                                pvalueCutoff = gsea_params$pvalueCutoff,
                                pAdjustMethod = gsea_params$pAdjustMethod,
                                eps = gsea_params$eps,
                                by = gsea_params$by,
                                showCategory = 20) {

  pref <- function(x) paste0(run_label, "__", analysis_label, "__", x)
  out_msig_root <- file.path(out_comp, "MSigDB_ALL")
  dir.create(out_msig_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  all_status <- list()

  for (coll in msig_collections()) {
    subs <- msig_subcollections(coll)

    if (is.null(subs)) {
      m <- safe_msig_term2gene(collection = coll)
      if (is.null(m) || nrow(m) == 0) next

      st <- run_and_save_gsea(
        fun = clusterProfiler::GSEA,
        prefix = pref(paste0("msig_", coll)),
        out_dir_local = file.path(out_msig_root, coll),
        showCategory = showCategory,
        geneList = ranks,
        TERM2GENE = m,
        nPermSimple = nPermSimple,
        minGSSize = minGSSize,
        maxGSSize = maxGSSize,
        pvalueCutoff = pvalueCutoff,
        pAdjustMethod = pAdjustMethod,
        eps = eps,
        by = by,
        verbose = FALSE,
        readable = TRUE
      )$status

      all_status[[length(all_status) + 1]] <- st

    } else {
      for (sub in subs) {
        m <- safe_msig_term2gene(collection = coll, subcollection = sub)
        if (is.null(m) || nrow(m) == 0) next

        st <- run_and_save_gsea(
          fun = clusterProfiler::GSEA,
          prefix = pref(paste0("msig_", coll, "_", sub)),
          out_dir_local = file.path(out_msig_root, coll, sub),
          showCategory = showCategory,
          geneList = ranks,
          TERM2GENE = m,
          nPermSimple = nPermSimple,
          minGSSize = minGSSize,
          maxGSSize = maxGSSize,
          pvalueCutoff = pvalueCutoff,
          pAdjustMethod = pAdjustMethod,
          eps = eps,
          by = by,
          verbose = FALSE,
          readable = TRUE
        )$status

        all_status[[length(all_status) + 1]] <- st
      }
    }
  }

  status_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_status)
  safe_write_csv(status_df, file.path(out_msig_root, "STATUS_MSigDB_ALL.csv"))
  status_df
}

# ---- main MSigDB-only loop (loads ranks from disk) ----
msig_all_status <- list()

for (nm in names(deg_files)) {
  out_comp <- file.path(out_dir, nm)
  ranks_path <- file.path(out_comp, "ranks_ENTREZ.rds")

  if (!file.exists(ranks_path)) {
    warning("No ranks_ENTREZ.rds found for ", nm, " at: ", ranks_path, " | skipping MSigDB-only pass")
    next
  }

  ranks_ent <- readRDS(ranks_path)

  if (length(ranks_ent) < 50) {
    warning("Too few ranks for ", nm, " (n=", length(ranks_ent), ") | skipping MSigDB-only pass")
    next
  }

  message("=== MSigDB-only pass: ", nm, " ===")
  msig_all_status[[nm]] <- run_msigdb_only_for(ranks_ent, analysis_label = nm, out_comp = out_comp)
}

msig_status_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(msig_all_status, .id = "comparison")
safe_write_csv(msig_status_all, file.path(out_dir, "STATUS_MSigDB_ALL_COMPARISONS.csv"))

message("MSigDB-only pass complete. Written under each comparison: <comparison>/MSigDB_ALL/")

```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# POST-RUN REGENERATION
# 1) regenerate dotplots split by NES positive / NES negative
# 2) regenerate readable CSVs
# 3) save everything in ONE FLAT FOLDER PER COMPARISON
# =========================================================

regen_cfg <- list(
  showCategory = 20,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  base_size = 8,
  title_size = 10,
  axis_text_size = 7,
  axis_title_size = 8,
  strip_text_size = 8,
  legend_text_size = 7,
  legend_title_size = 8
)

regen_root <- file.path(out_dir, "REGENERATED_BY_COMPARISON")
dir.create(regen_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------
is_enrichment_rds <- function(x) {
  inherits(x, "gseaResult") || inherits(x, "enrichResult")
}

safe_result_tbl <- function(res) {
  tryCatch(
    tibble::as_tibble(res@result),
    error = function(e) {
      message("WARN: could not extract @result | ", e$message)
      tibble::tibble()
    }
  )
}

make_readable_if_possible <- function(res) {
  # only makes sense for gene IDs like ENTREZID
  tryCatch(
    clusterProfiler::setReadable(res, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID"),
    error = function(e) {
      message("WARN: setReadable failed | ", e$message)
      res
    }
  )
}

subset_result_object <- function(res, keep_idx) {
  res2 <- res
  res_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res2)

  if (nrow(res_tbl) == 0 || length(keep_idx) != nrow(res_tbl)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  res2@result <- res_tbl[keep_idx, , drop = FALSE]

  # keep geneList / params / metadata unchanged
  # dotplot mainly relies on @result
  if (nrow(res2@result) == 0) return(NULL)

  res2
}

make_flat_name <- function(file_path, comparison_name, out_dir_root) {
  rel <- sub(
    paste0("^", gsub("([\\^\\$\\.\\|\\(\\)\\[\\]\\*\\+\\?\\\\])", "\\\\\\1", out_dir_root), "/?"),
    "",
    file_path
  )

  rel <- sub("\\.rds$", "", rel)
  rel <- sub(paste0("^", comparison_name, "/?"), "", rel)
  rel <- gsub("/", "__", rel)
  rel <- gsub("\\s+", "_", rel)

  rel
}

build_dotplot <- function(res, title_text, cfg = regen_cfg) {
  res_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res)
  if (nrow(res_tbl) == 0) return(NULL)

  ncat <- min(cfg$showCategory, nrow(res_tbl))

  tryCatch({
    enrichplot::dotplot(res, showCategory = ncat) +
      ggplot2::ggtitle(title_text) +
      ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = cfg$base_size) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        plot.title   = ggplot2::element_text(size = cfg$title_size),
        axis.text    = ggplot2::element_text(size = cfg$axis_text_size),
        axis.title   = ggplot2::element_text(size = cfg$axis_title_size),
        strip.text   = ggplot2::element_text(size = cfg$strip_text_size),
        legend.text  = ggplot2::element_text(size = cfg$legend_text_size),
        legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = cfg$legend_title_size)
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("WARN: dotplot failed for ", title_text, " | ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

save_plot_pair <- function(plot_obj, out_base, cfg = regen_cfg) {
  if (is.null(plot_obj)) return(invisible(FALSE))

  safe_ggsave(
    paste0(out_base, ".png"),
    plot_obj,
    width = cfg$width,
    height = cfg$height,
    dpi = cfg$dpi
  )
  safe_ggsave(
    paste0(out_base, ".pdf"),
    plot_obj,
    width = cfg$width,
    height = cfg$height,
    dpi = cfg$dpi
  )

  invisible(TRUE)
}

regen_one_rds <- function(f, comparison_name, comparison_out_dir, out_dir_root, cfg = regen_cfg) {
  res <- tryCatch(readRDS(f), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(res) || !is_enrichment_rds(res)) return(invisible(FALSE))

  # readable CSV export
  res_readable <- make_readable_if_possible(res)
  readable_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res_readable)

  flat_name <- make_flat_name(f, comparison_name = comparison_name, out_dir_root = out_dir_root)

  if (nrow(readable_tbl) > 0) {
    safe_write_csv(
      readable_tbl,
      file.path(comparison_out_dir, paste0(flat_name, "__readable.csv"))
    )
  }

  # plot regeneration
  res_tbl <- safe_result_tbl(res)
  if (nrow(res_tbl) == 0) return(invisible(TRUE))

  # if NES exists, split into positive and negative
  if ("NES" %in% colnames(res_tbl)) {
    pos_idx <- !is.na(res_tbl$NES) & res_tbl$NES > 0
    neg_idx <- !is.na(res_tbl$NES) & res_tbl$NES < 0

    res_pos <- subset_result_object(res, pos_idx)
    res_neg <- subset_result_object(res, neg_idx)

    if (!is.null(res_pos) && nrow(res_pos@result) > 0) {
      p_pos <- build_dotplot(
        res_pos,
        title_text = paste0(flat_name, " | NES positive"),
        cfg = cfg
      )
      save_plot_pair(
        p_pos,
        file.path(comparison_out_dir, paste0(flat_name, "__NES_positive_dotplot_REGEN")),
        cfg = cfg
      )
    }

    if (!is.null(res_neg) && nrow(res_neg@result) > 0) {
      p_neg <- build_dotplot(
        res_neg,
        title_text = paste0(flat_name, " | NES negative"),
        cfg = cfg
      )
      save_plot_pair(
        p_neg,
        file.path(comparison_out_dir, paste0(flat_name, "__NES_negative_dotplot_REGEN")),
        cfg = cfg
      )
    }

  } else {
    # fallback for enrichResult or objects without NES
    p_all <- build_dotplot(
      res,
      title_text = paste0(flat_name, " | all terms"),
      cfg = cfg
    )
    save_plot_pair(
      p_all,
      file.path(comparison_out_dir, paste0(flat_name, "__dotplot_REGEN")),
      cfg = cfg
    )
  }

  invisible(TRUE)
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# main loop: one FLAT folder per comparison
# ---------------------------------------------------------
regen_status <- list()

for (nm in names(deg_files)) {
  message("=== Regenerating outputs for comparison: ", nm, " ===")

  comp_dir <- file.path(out_dir, nm)
  if (!dir.exists(comp_dir)) {
    warning("Comparison output folder not found: ", comp_dir)
    next
  }

  comparison_out_dir <- file.path(regen_root, nm)
  dir.create(comparison_out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  rds_files <- list.files(
    comp_dir,
    pattern = "\\.rds$",
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  # skip rank vectors
  rds_files <- rds_files[!grepl("ranks_ENTREZ\\.rds$", rds_files)]

  # optional: skip readable duplicates to avoid duplicate outputs
  # if both X.rds and X__readable.rds exist, keep only X.rds and generate readable csv from it
  plain_rds <- rds_files[!grepl("__readable\\.rds$", rds_files)]
  readable_rds <- rds_files[grepl("__readable\\.rds$", rds_files)]

  plain_key <- sub("\\.rds$", "", plain_rds)
  readable_key <- sub("__readable\\.rds$", "", readable_rds)

  chosen_rds <- c(
    plain_rds,
    readable_rds[!readable_key %in% plain_key]
  )

  n_done <- 0L
  n_skip <- 0L

  for (f in chosen_rds) {
    ok <- tryCatch(
      regen_one_rds(
        f = f,
        comparison_name = nm,
        comparison_out_dir = comparison_out_dir,
        out_dir_root = out_dir,
        cfg = regen_cfg
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        message("WARN: failed on ", f, " | ", e$message)
        FALSE
      }
    )

    if (isTRUE(ok)) n_done <- n_done + 1L else n_skip <- n_skip + 1L
  }

  regen_status[[nm]] <- tibble::tibble(
    comparison = nm,
    n_rds_processed = n_done,
    n_rds_skipped = n_skip,
    output_folder = comparison_out_dir
  )
}

regen_status_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(regen_status)
safe_write_csv(regen_status_df, file.path(regen_root, "REGEN_STATUS.csv"))

message("Done.")
message("All regenerated outputs written under: ", regen_root)
```
